title: No Offhand Torch Placement
description: Prevents placing torches while holding them in the offhand.
body:
## NOTP
### - No
### - Offhand
### - Torch
### - Placement

When playing with dynamic lighting, you often want to hold a torch and interact without placing multiple torches accidentally (for example, while eating). This mod prevents placing torches from the offhand unless the player is sneaking.

**Added features:**
-Prevents placing torches while they are in your offhand
-Allows placing torches from the offhand only while sneaking
